Meet Susie
(Yes, she's real!)
Hi! I’m Susan, the founder of SusieCakes!
Every day as a child, I would come home from school to enjoy my beloved grandmothers’ company over a glass of milk and a fresh baked treat.
This daily baking ritual and special time together in the kitchen meant everything to me, so when I grew up and moved to the West Coast, I brought along my grandmothers’ carefully recorded recipes on handwritten 3×5 cards.
Those pure and simple recipes helped foster SusieCakes bakeries, and has helped me share my experience with others and keep finding the celebration in each and every day.
Read more about us
Big or small, remember to tag your next SusieCakes celebration!

A Note From Susie
Shipping a cake requires a lot of attention to detail to ensure it arrives fresh and looks great! That’s why we have spent the past few years perfecting the shipping process.
The #1 question I received for years to my "Dear Susie" email (susie@susiecakes.com) is: "When will you start to ship your products?" We are now thrilled to share that day has come! Please read below for a detailed overview of the process and to answer any questions you may have!
How it Works...
1
Made to Order
First, your cake is made to order and then promptly frozen to lock in freshness. We then use our custom designed food safe wrap liner to protect the cake followed by shrink wrapping the cake to keep it super fresh.
2
Perfectly Packaged
Next, we pack it with a custom designed inner cake box surrounded by decorative crinkle paper and we wrap the box in twine so the presentation of the gift looks amazing, including a hand written card.
3
Shipped from our Bakehouse
We then place the cake box into a custom fitted (and insulated!) branded shipping box and dry ice is added to keep the cake cool. Storage/serving instructions are also added to the box. UPS then picks up the box from our bakehouse!
4
Delivered to Your Door
Your box will arrive on your doorstep. Handle the dry ice with care (using something such as oven mitts), place the wrapped cake in the refrigerator and follow the storage/serving instructions. Enjoy!
Shipping Questions
How do you ship?
Shipping a cake requires a lot of attention to detail to ensure it arrives fresh and looks great! First, your cake is made to order and then promptly frozen to lock in freshness. We then use our custom designed food safe wrap liner to protect the cake followed by shrink wrapping the cake to keep it super fresh. After, we pack it with a custom designed inner cake box surrounded by decorative crinkle paper and we wrap the box in twine so the presentation of the gift looks amazing. We then place the cake box into a custom fitted (and insulated!) branded shipping box and dry ice is added to keep the cake nice and cool. Storage/serving instructions are also added to the box along with a handwritten card if that option is selected.
Where do you ship to/from?
We ship nationwide excluding AK and HI. If you are in California, Texas (Dallas, Austin, San Antonio) or in Nashville we suggest ordering from our local bakeries
HERE
for a wider selection of items to have delivered or to pick-up from our 25+ bakeries.
We ship to business and residential areas and even most college campuses!
We ship from our bakery in Dallas, TX and ship all our cakes Monday - Thursday.

meta.meta_description: SusieCakes is an All-American bakery offering classic desserts made entirely from scratch using simple, natural ingredients. SusieCakes is now shipping nationwide!
